name: meeting-facilitation-workflow
description: AI-led meeting session: join → listen N seconds → leave. Emits a transcript artifact for downstream action-item and fairness follow-up pipelines. Supports Google Meet, Microsoft Teams, and Zoom.

params.message: 🎙️ Meeting facilitation start — url={{meeting_url}} persona={{persona_name}} duration={{listen_duration_sec}}s
🛑 Meeting closed. Screenshot: {{screenshot_path}} | Transcript: {{transcript_path}}. Run pipelines/meeting-facilitation-postprocess.json for action-item extraction.
